Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Continued To Apr-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Exstreme Engineering & Fabrication, LLC and Bruce J. Blair.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:23 a.m.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
Mr. Cefalu appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Mr. Cefalu was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Exstreme Engineering & Fabrication, LLC or Bruce J. Blair.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Breach of Personal Guaranty, Claim & Delivery, Conversion, Trespass to Personal Property and Unjust Enrichment was filed on February 21, 2018, and personally served on defendant Exstreme Engineering & Fabrication, LLC's Agent of Process on April 25, 2018.
Plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying document were personally served on defendant Bruce J. Blair on August 13, 2018.
Default as to defendant Bruce J. Blair was entered on November 20, 2018.
Default as to defendant Exstreme Engineering & Fabrication, LLC was entered on July 10, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 27, 2021.
Order Waiving Witness Appearance at Default Prove-Up hearing filed March 3, 2022.

Plaintiff Bank of the West submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Equipment Finance Agreement dated 12/30/2015...............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Personal Guaranty signed 12/30/2015........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court issues a TENTATIVE RULING in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the defaulted defendants Exstreme Engineering & Fabrication, LLC and Bruce J. Blair, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,319.29.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - TBD. {Tentatively $3,924.00}
Costs - $1,785.21.

Total - $75,327.50 (Tentative Ruling)

Matter is CONINTUED to April 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for hearing on the sole issue of plaintiff's request for attorney fees. Counsel to submit documentation in support of the requested attorney fees to the Court, forthwith.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:36 a.m.
